_comment: Copy this into your Claude Code settings under mcpServers.figma to enable the official Figma MCP server. The server is remote (HTTP) and auths via OAuth — run /mcp inside Claude Code after adding it. Requires Dev or Full seat on Professional/Organization/Enterprise plans for full rate limits; Starter/View seats are limited to 6 tool calls per month. Source: https://github.com/figma/mcp-server-guide
